versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   cluster-autoscaler-9-55-0       true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: cluster-autoscaler
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: cluster-autoscaler-9-55-0
      name: cluster-autoscaler
      namespace: cluster-autoscaler
      values: |
        cluster-autoscaler:
          cloudProvider: aws
          awsRegion: us-west-2
          autoDiscovery:
            clusterName: my-cluster
          rbac:
            serviceAccount:
              create: true
              annotations:
                eks.amazonaws.com/role-arn: arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/ClusterAutoscalerRole
